requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Power-Quality Evidence

summary.en: OCPP requirements in Montenegro are typically project-driven rather than a single published national EVSE protocol mandate. Networked public chargers should be prepared for OCPP interoperability, remote monitoring, metering data exchange, fault reporting, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be based on IEC 61000-family testing and coordinated with CGES requirements for the connection point.
summary.zh: 黑山对 OCPP 的要求通常由具体项目驱动，而非单一全国性 EVSE 协议硬性统一。联网公共充电桩应准备 OCPP 兼容、远程监控、计量数据交换、故障上报和负荷管理能力。EMC 和电能质量证据应基于 IEC 61000 家族测试，并与 CGES 的接入点要求协调。
summary.zht: 黑山對 OCPP 的要求通常由具體項目驅動，而非單一全國性 EVSE 協議硬性統一。聯網公共充電樁應準備 OCPP 兼容、遠端監控、計量數據交換、故障上報和負荷管理能力。EMC 和電能質量證據應基於 IEC 61000 家族測試，並與 CGES 的接入點要求協調。

standards_or_laws: OCPP interoperability context for networked chargers
CGES and REGAGEN project oversight where network operation issues arise

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930 between charger and battery management system. That stack is not a direct substitute for OCPP interoperability and is not equivalent to CCS2/IEC communication requirements. Chinese EMC reports may need reassessment against Montenegro site conditions and CGES coordination.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常在充电机与电池管理系统之间实现 GB/T 27930，这一通信栈不等同于 OCPP 互操作，也不等同于 IEC/CCS2 通信要求。中国 EMC 报告可能需要结合黑山现场条件和 CGES 协调进行复核。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常在充電樁與電池管理系統之間實作 GB/T 27930，該通信棧不等同於 OCPP 互通，也不等於 IEC/CCS2 通信要求。中國 EMC 報告可能需要結合黑山現場條件和 CGES 協調進行複核。

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version and cybersecurity expectations in each Montenegro project, test remote monitoring and fault reporting with the intended operator, prepare IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence, and document load-management functions for the CGES connection point.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认每个黑山项目要求的 OCPP 版本和网络安全预期，与目标运营商测试远程监控和故障上报，准备 IEC 61000 EMC 与谐波证据，并为 CGES 接入点记录负荷管理功能。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認每個黑山項目要求的 OCPP 版本和網絡安全預期，與目標運營商測試遠程監控和故障上報，準備 IEC 61000 EMC 與諧波證據，並為 CGES 接入點記錄負荷管理功能。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent where required by the charge-point operator, public charging tender, fleet owner, or network-management specification; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected for grid coordination
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-to-charger communication and is not an OCPP or IEC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For networked chargers in Montenegro, confirm project-level OCPP and remote-management requirements and prepare IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence for utility coordination. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy these needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于黑山联网充电桩，应在项目层面确认 OCPP 和远程管理要求，并为电网协调准备 IEC 61000 EMC 与电能质量证据。仅有 GB/T 27930 不能满足这类要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於黑山聯網充電樁，應在項目層面確認 OCPP 與遠程管理要求，並為電網協調準備 IEC 61000 EMC 與電能品質證據。僅有 GB/T 27930 無法滿足該要求。
